summary: Removed the leftover assembly file asm/melee/it/items/itcoin.s. The PR body says this was forgotten in the previous PR because the author thought it had already been removed. No replacement C code or build-list changes are shown in this slice, so this record should be treated as cleanup following an earlier itcoin decompilation/removal step.

key_files.details: Removed 1264 lines of PowerPC assembly for itcoin item routines.

what_changed: The removed file contained global assembly symbols including it_802F13B4, it_802F14E4, it_802F1518, it_802F1588, it_802F15B0, it_802F15B8, it_802F1604, it_802F1630, it_802F1850, it_802F1858, it_802F185C, it_802F1888, it_802F18E4, it_802F18EC, it_802F18F0, and it_802F1910.
No comments, review discussion, or additional file edits are present in the PR slice.
smart_moves: Performed a narrow follow-up cleanup instead of mixing the forgotten assembly deletion with unrelated changes.
Removed the obsolete asm source once it was no longer needed, reducing duplicate/stale decomp artifacts in asm/melee/it/items.
decomp_lessons: After decompiling or moving an item module out of asm, explicitly verify that the old asm/melee/it/items/*.s file was deleted.
Small cleanup PRs are acceptable for missed assembly-removal steps, but the evidence for the actual matching/decompilation work may live in the preceding PR.
When a PR only deletes assembly, future researchers should cross-reference the immediately preceding related PR to find the C implementation, matching strategy, and any symbol naming rationale.
naming_conventions: The deleted assembly used address-based item symbol names with the it_ prefix, such as it_802F13B4 and it_802F1630.

External calls in the assembly followed subsystem/address naming such as gm_801A45E8, grFigureGet_80219C50, Camera_80031144, Ground_801C1D84, HSD_JObjSetFlagsAll, HSD_JObjClearFlagsAll, and Item_80268E5C.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: This PR does not show matching tactics directly; it only removes the old assembly file.

The deleted assembly included item callbacks/stubs, JObj flag toggling, asserts, matrix dirty updates, and calls into item, game, ground, camera, figure-get, and HSD systems, which may help locate the corresponding C replacement in earlier/later history.
review_feedback: No issue comments, review comments, or reviews are present in the provided PR context.
The only human explanation is the author note: "Forgot this in the last PR, since I thought it was gone already".
searchable_terms: forgot this in the last PR
follow_up_queries: Find the previous PR by PsiLupan touching itcoin to identify the C replacement for asm/melee/it/items/itcoin.s.
Search for current definitions of it_802F13B4, it_802F14E4, it_802F1518, it_802F1588, it_802F1630, and it_802F1910 to map the deleted assembly symbols to their decompiled source file.
Check build/linker lists around PR 1449 to confirm the asm file had already been removed from compilation before this file deletion.
